product.name: House Therapy Aroma Spray
product.info: 반려동물용 아로마/탈취 스프레이. 향기로 공간과 마음을 치유.

concept: 못 나는 기린새가 제품을 뿌리고 향기와 함께 하늘로 승천

shots.title: 넘어짐
shots.image_prompt: Girabird (giraffe-flamingo hybrid) on a glossy pink neon runway with a blurred audience, having stumbled and fallen, dejected sad look, pink feathers floating. 9:16, 3D Pixar style, keep character consistent.
shots.motion_prompt: Struts then trips over its long legs and tumbles down, feathers scattering, embarrassed.

shots.title: 관객 핸드오프
shots.image_prompt: A human hand from the audience offers the House Therapy Aroma Spray bottle to the fallen Girabird, who looks up hopefully. Pink neon runway. 9:16, 3D Pixar style.
shots.motion_prompt: Hand extends the spray; Girabird reaches out and takes it, hopeful.

shots.title: 칙— 스프레이
shots.image_prompt: Girabird sprays the House Therapy Aroma Spray over itself, sparkling aromatic mist, feathers fluffing and shimmering, delighted energized. Pink neon. 9:16, 3D Pixar style, product label consistent.
shots.motion_prompt: Sprays itself, mist swirls, eyes light up, happy shiver.

shots.title: 향기→승천
shots.motion_prompt: Aromatic mist expands and lifts Girabird off the runway; body lightens, wings spread, rises as pink runway dissolves into bright sky. Magical ascension morph.

shots.title: 하늘 비상
shots.image_prompt: Girabird soaring high in a bright sky with clouds, wings spread wide, joyful free, the House Therapy Aroma Spray featured. 9:16, 3D Pixar style, uplifting, consistent.
shots.motion_prompt: Soars and ascends, wings flapping, feathers streaming, radiant.
